item.title: [NET] Cloudflare Reports Record Q1 Revenue Growth
item.description: Cloudflare announced first-quarter revenue of $632 million, a 32% increase year-over-year.

item.title: [NET] Cloudflare Expands AI Gateway Features
item.description: Cloudflare launched new AI Gateway features for developers.

item.title: [IBM] IBM Quantum Division Hits Major Milestone
item.description: IBM quantum computing division achieved breakthrough with 1,121-qubit Condor processor.

item.title: [IBM] IBM Cloud Revenue Surges 18% YoY
item.description: IBM reported cloud revenue growth of 18% year-over-year for Q1.

item.title: [MSFT] Microsoft Copilot Reaches 500M Users
item.description: Microsoft Copilot AI assistant surpassed 500 million monthly active users.

item.title: [MSFT] Azure Revenue Beats Analyst Estimates
item.description: Microsoft Azure cloud revenue grew 34% in the latest quarter.

item.title: [AAPL] Apple Intelligence Rollout Expands to 30 Countries
item.description: Apple expanded Apple Intelligence features to 30 countries with 12 additional languages.

item.title: [GOOG] Google Gemini 3 Launches With New Capabilities
item.description: Google unveiled Gemini 3 with native multimodal reasoning and 2M-token context.

item.title: [TSLA] Tesla Robotaxi Service Begins in Austin
item.description: Tesla launched robotaxi service in Austin with 500 Model 3 vehicles.

item.title: [AMZN] AWS Launches Next-Gen Custom Chips
item.description: AWS unveiled Graviton5 and Trainium3 chips with 40% better price-performance.
